Great CritDamage

An interesting example: using GMurphy can reach a million critical damage.  
Specific situation: If you encounter a boss (Doll), especially when the boss is using skills, limit the team's health to 1 HP. At this point, if you have several thousand sacrifice points, according to GMurphy's passive: for every 1% of maximum HP in sacrifice points, you gain 3% critical damage.  
An interesting situation arises: the logic of maximum HP changes, from the original HP to just 1HP.  
That means 1 HP is considered 100% of maximum health, which can correspond to 300% critical damage. 1,000 sacrifice points would correspond to 300% * 1,000 critical damage.
